creator: jack@germanium.xtalwind.net
text:
> You forgot to install new file run/cfgmaker_phys !!!

Arrggg.  Actually, I included the wrong patch file.  This is the
one I should have sent.

Glad someone is paying attention.  :)


diff -ruN mrtg/Makefile mrtg.new/Makefile
--- mrtg/Makefile	Wed Sep  8 19:43:09 1999
+++ mrtg.new/Makefile	Tue Dec  7 14:58:46 1999
@@ -1,12 +1,12 @@
 # New ports collection makefile for:	MRTG
-# Version required:			2.8.8
+# Version required:			2.8.9
 # Date created:				April 18th 1997
 # Whom:	      				James FitzGibbon <jfitz@FreeBSD.org>
 #
 # $FreeBSD: ports/net/mrtg/Makefile,v 1.17 1999/09/08 22:42:09 fenner Exp $
 #
 
-DISTNAME=	mrtg-2.8.8
+DISTNAME=	mrtg-2.8.9
 CATEGORIES=	net
 MASTER_SITES=	http://ee-staff.ethz.ch/~oetiker/webtools/mrtg/pub/
 
@@ -45,7 +45,7 @@
 			${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/run/$$file ${PREFIX}/lib/perl5/site_perl/${PERL_VER}; \
 		done
 		${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/run/rateup ${PREFIX}/bin/
-		for file in mrtg cfgmaker cfgmaker_ip indexmaker; do \
+		for file in mrtg cfgmaker cfgmaker_ip cfgmaker_phys indexmaker; do \
 			${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKSRC}/run/$$file ${PREFIX}/bin/; \
 		done
 
diff -ruN mrtg/files/md5 mrtg.new/files/md5
--- mrtg/files/md5	Wed Sep  8 19:43:09 1999
+++ mrtg.new/files/md5	Fri Nov 26 15:10:37 1999
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (mrtg-2.8.8.tar.gz) = 0610929a8c480cce570f810f52f5c194
+MD5 (mrtg-2.8.9.tar.gz) = 32d51c86e726d31fa9f8ebd02456a80f
diff -ruN mrtg/pkg/PLIST mrtg.new/pkg/PLIST
--- mrtg/pkg/PLIST	Fri Jul 30 12:41:14 1999
+++ mrtg.new/pkg/PLIST	Tue Dec  7 14:57:55 1999
@@ -1,5 +1,6 @@
 bin/cfgmaker
 bin/cfgmaker_ip
+bin/cfgmaker_phys
 bin/indexmaker
 bin/mrtg
 bin/rateup
